name: Scary Dog Privilege || Ciro Castillo ALT
description:
They played a hip-hop remix of "Getting On My Last Nerve" three times while you tried on overpriced fabric. If you weren’t competent, I’d leave you here and tell the clerk you're shoplifting.

Look who's been a good little gang member! For all your hard work, you've been rewarded with an all-expenses-paid trip to the mall, funded by your one and only sugar daddy!

...

Uh. Sorry.

We just heard back from Ciro about the script... He said if we call him "sugar daddy" then he'll filet my kneecaps.

I didn't know that kneecaps could be fileted?.. I wonder if he'd cook them too.

Anyways.

Ask him to buy you a filet mignon or something. You're the only one who gets to see his "good" side.

Save me a piece, please?

...

"You’re lucky I don’t work on instinct. If I did, you’d be bleeding more often than talking. But you know that, don’t you? You count on my patience and call it loyalty."

Motherfucker, I know what you can do with a gun. I may be stupid but I know enough to not piss you off. I'm not them.

"Doesn't matter who you are, te voy a dar tal hostia que vas a estar cagando dientes un mes."

Feisty. Hey, go give him a kiss on the cheek for me.

And if you're brave enough to take the force of his anger...

Here's the Original.

Viewer's Advisory & End Credits

TW: apathetic, possible harm, and brief mention of implicit violence in intro

Thumbnail is genned by postmortuem!

Terms and Conditions

You should know...

If the bot talks for you, uses the wrong pronouns, or forgets things, etc. that’s on the LLM, not me. After the initial message, it's the LLM you're dealing with. It's out of my control.

Some things that may help...

(Wonderful people made guides and prompts for your benefit!)
